summary: Iteration 68: Comprehensive testing of NEW /alarmas-hogar (Securitas Direct style) page. ALL UI features tested and passed: Hero with family image + mini calculator, sticky header with nav links, 4-step 'Como Funciona' section, Tipos Vivienda tabs (Piso/Chalet/Negocio/Nave), App section with mockup, Sentinel SOS section with /productos link, 3 pricing cards (Essential 24.99, Premium 39.99, Business 54.99), VS Competencia comparison table (10 rows), FAQ accordion (10 questions), and final CTA. All CTAs navigate correctly to /calculador.
passed_tests: /alarmas-hogar page loads with data-testid='alarmas-securitas-style'
Hero title 'Protege lo que mas te importa' displayed correctly
Hero family image displayed with proper background
Sticky header with logo and 6 navigation links (Nuestra alarma, Tipos de vivienda, Como funciona, App, Precios, FAQ)
Phone number 601 510 950 visible in header
Header CTA 'Calcular mi alarma' button navigates to /calculador
Mini calculator in hero with 4 type buttons (Piso, Chalet/Casa, Local/Oficina, Nave/Almacen)
Mini calculator: clicking Piso shows price 24,99 EUR/mes
Mini calculator: clicking Chalet shows price 39,99 EUR/mes
Mini calculator: 'Equipo + instalacion GRATIS' text displayed
Mini calculator CTA 'Personalizar mi presupuesto' button present
Hero badges: Centro 24h, Camaras IA, Anti-inhibicion, Sentinel SOS
Hero CTA 'Calcula tu alarma online' button present
Trust bar: +3.200 Hogares, +950 Empresas, <60s Respuesta, 4.9/5 Valoracion, 0 Permanencia
Nuestra Alarma section (#alarma) with data-testid='nuestra-alarma'
Section title 'La alarma mas inteligente del mercado'
Panel de Control: 'El cerebro de tu seguridad' with features grid
Panel features: Pantalla tactil HD, Sirena integrada 120dB, Anti-inhibicion, Bateria backup 24h, 4G + WiFi + Ethernet, Codigo + RFID + mando
Camaras con IA section with features list
Camera features: Deteccion inteligente personas, Vision nocturna infrarroja, Audio bidireccional, Grabacion nube 90 dias
Kit completo with 4 component cards (Centralita Hub, Sirena Exterior, Mandos Premium, Sentinel SOS)
Como Funciona section (#como-funciona) with data-testid='como-funciona'
Como Funciona: 4 steps (Deteccion, Verificacion por video, Alerta inmediata, Respuesta <60 seg)
Instalacion GRATIS section with tecnico image
Installation badges: Sin obras, Sin cables, Menos de 2h, Tecnico certificado, Config app incluida
Tipos de Vivienda section (#tipos) with data-testid='tipos-vivienda'
Section title 'Alarma adaptada a tu espacio'
4 property tabs: Piso/Apartamento, Chalet/Casa, Local/Oficina, Nave/Almacen
Tabs work correctly: clicking changes content and image
Piso tab shows 'Alarma para pisos y apartamentos' with 24,99 EUR/mes
Chalet tab shows 'Alarma para chalets y casas' with 39,99 EUR/mes
Negocio tab shows 'Alarma para negocios' with 54,99 EUR/mes
Nave tab shows 'Alarma para naves y almacenes' with 54,99 EUR/mes
Each tab shows kit items list and CTA buttons
App section (#app) with data-testid='app-section'
App title 'Tu alarma en el bolsillo'
App features: Armar y desarmar, Ver camaras en directo, Alertas push, Gestionar usuarios, GPS de relojes Sentinel, Compatible con Sentinel X, J y S
App mockup image displayed
Sentinel SOS section with 'Reloj Sentinel SOS incluido' title
Sentinel features: Boton SOS 24h, GPS tiempo real, E-SIM integrada, Sensor cardiaco, Alerta caida, Arma/desarma alarma
'Ver relojes Sentinel' link to /productos present (data-testid='ver-sentinel-link')
Sentinel watches image displayed
Precios section (#precios) with data-testid='precios-section'
Section title 'Precios transparentes'
3 price cards: Essential (24,99), Premium (39,99), Business (54,99)
Premium card has 'MAS VENDIDO' badge
Price cards show promo price, regular price, equipment items
'Calcular mi precio' buttons on each card navigate to /calculador
VS Competencia section with data-testid='vs-competencia'
VS title 'ManoProtect vs Securitas Direct vs Prosegur'
Comparison table with 3 columns and 10 rows
Comparison rows: Desde, Permanencia, Equipo, Camaras kit basico, IA en camaras, Reloj SOS incluido, Anti-inhibicion, Funciona sin movil, App gratuita, Aviso a Policia
FAQ section (#faq) with data-testid='faq-section'
FAQ title 'Preguntas frecuentes'
10 FAQ questions with accordion functionality
FAQ accordions open/close correctly when clicked
FAQ answers display correctly (verified 'Policia Nacional' in first answer)
Final CTA section with 'Calcula tu alarma ahora' title
Final CTA button 'Calcular mi alarma GRATIS' (data-testid='cta-final-calc')
Phone link 601 510 950 in final CTA
/nuestra-alarma route loads same AlarmasSecuritasStyle page
StockUrgencyPopup appears after ~8 seconds and can be dismissed
Cookie consent banner appears and can be dismissed
Footer has correct links: Alarmas Hogar y Empresa, Alarmas Vivienda, Alarmas Negocio, Calcular Presupuesto
Calculator (/calculador) 4-step wizard works correctly
Sobre Nosotros (/about-us) page loads with team, timeline, office info
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 68 comprehensively tested the NEW /alarmas-hogar page (Securitas Direct style). All sections verified: (1) Hero with family image, mini calculator (4 property types showing prices), badges, CTAs. (2) Sticky header with 6 nav links (#alarma, #tipos, #como-funciona, #app, #precios, #faq) + phone + CTA. (3) Trust bar with stats. (4) Nuestra Alarma section - panel de control with 6 features, camaras IA with 5 features, kit completo with 4 component cards. (5) Como Funciona - 4 steps + installation badges. (6) Tipos Vivienda - 4 tabs (Piso/Chalet/Negocio/Nave) changing content/images/prices. (7) App section with mockup and 6 features. (8) Sentinel SOS section with features and /productos link. (9) Precios - 3 cards (Essential 24.99, Premium 39.99 MAS VENDIDO, Business 54.99). (10) VS Competencia - 10-row comparison table. (11) FAQ - 10 accordion questions. (12) Final CTA. /nuestra-alarma route also loads same page. Footer has correct alarm links. Calculator wizard works. Sobre Nosotros page verified.

hero.title: Protege lo que mas te importa
